chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Has Been Reported Regarding Adultery

text: 4982 - وَ صَعِدَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ اَلْمِنْبَرَ فَقَالَ: "ثَلاَثَةٌ "لاٰ يُكَلِّمُهُمُ اَللّٰهُ يَوْمَ اَلْقِيٰامَةِ " "وَ لاٰ يَنْظُرُ إِلَيْهِمْ"... "وَ لاٰ يُزَكِّيهِمْ وَ لَهُمْ عَذٰابٌ أَلِيمٌ" شَيْخٌ زَانٍ وَ مَلِكٌ جَبَّارٌ وَ مُقِلٌّ مُخْتَالٌ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4982 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) ascended the pulpit and said:
"Three types of people Allah (swt) will not speak to on the Day of Judgment, nor will He (swt) look at them, nor will He (swt) purify them, and for them is a painful punishment: an old man who commits adultery, a tyrannical king, and a poor person who is arrogant."
